ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., M, L, XL) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "bust_size" REAL /* Bust size measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "waist_size" REAL /* Waist size measurement in inches */,
  "hip_size" REAL /* Hip size measurement in inches */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., slim, regular, loose) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., ideal for tall and lean individuals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of items in stock */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product (e.g., features, benefits) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the product (e.g., cotton, polyester) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Shirts, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size available for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in the specified size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being checked */,
  "measurement_standard" TEXT /* Measurement standard used for the check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size being analyzed */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Total sales count for the size during the report period */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_analysis_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_analysis_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory change log */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of change in inventory (can be positive or negative) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., New Stock, Returned) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on purchase history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
